suppress.notes: Reviewed 2026-06-11 False positive: CVE-2025-21199 applies to Microsoft Azure Agent and Site Recovery. Affected libraries reported by dependency-check are: - applicationinsights-core 3.7.8 Versions of used libraries are their latest respectively.

Reviewed 2026-06-11 False positive: CVE-2026-33117 applies to Microsoft Azure SDK for Java. Affected libraries reported by dependency-check are: - azure-core 1.58.0 - azure-core-amqp 2.11.4 - azure-core-http-netty 1.16.4 - azure-json 1.5.1 Versions of used libraries are their latest respectively.

Reviewed 2026-06-11 False positive: CVE-2020-29582 applies to Kotlin SDK, a transitive dependency of feign-okhttp 13.12 and okhttp 5.4.0 (latest available versions used). Affected libraries reported by dependency-check are: - kotlin-stdlib 1.9.25 - kotlin-stdlib-jdk7 1.9.25 - kotlin-stdlib-jdk8 1.9.25 Versions of used libraries are their latest respectively.

Reviewed 2026-06-18 False positive: CVE-2025-7962 applies to angus-activation. Affected libraries reported by dependency-check are: - angus-activation 2.0.3 Versions of used libraries are their latest respectively.
